entries.title: groundtruth
entries.description: Audits whether an agent actually did what it was asked. Catches the false 'Done' on Stop: missed subtasks, stubbed/no-op work, false 'tests pass', a method silently dropped in a refactor (dangling reference), and — uniquely — a standing project rule that was in context and overridden anyway. Runs on Stop, pre-commit, and CI; warn by default, opt-in block.

entries.title: baseimage-oci
entries.description: 외부 오픈소스 이미지(Docker Hub 등)를 OCI(KSA) 이미지 보안 정책에 따라 허용 BaseImage(navix/ubuntu/alpine)로 래핑하는 워크플로 스킬. 원본 Dockerfile 탐색 → 계열 매핑 → FROM 교체 → (선택) 로컬 빌드·실행 테스트 → OCIR push → 보안검수. 공개 Dockerfile 부재 시 공개 대체 이미지/예외 whitelist 안내.

entries.title: reflect
entries.description: Agent self-improvement + retrieval. Captures learnings via colon-namespaced sub-skills (reflect, reflect:consolidate, reflect:ingest, reflect:recall, reflect:status) and auto-injects relevant prior learnings via SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit hooks. PostToolUse arms low-cost mini-learning capture; Stop enqueues short-session reflection. v4 cost rearchitecture: a $0 skip-gate + cascade slice the drain so it runs on Sonnet under hard caps (8 turns / 180s / 2M-token poison), with cost observability (reflect cost) and a weekly Opus synthesis pass. Philosophy: Correct once, never again; recall everything next time.

entries.title: doc-mirror
entries.description: The doc-mirror claude system: a 1:1 documentation mirror of any codebase, maintained by an invariant doc-mirror STATE MACHINE (per-module doc(m), 6 context/ index files, fork-on-change, no random documents). Bundles doc-mirror-boot (entry + core-loop prime + router), the doc-mirror-{init,seework,change,prompts} state-skills, doc-mirror-install (the host-setup WIZARD), ship-a-plugin (the build+distribute dev-flow), doc-mirror (THE LAW), and make-ai-operating-system (the architect for new systems of this class); the brainhook work-loop + session-start + transition-guard + readonly-guard hooks (plugin-native via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT); the journal/projects/vision/plan/tracker/commit/cursor + docmirror-search CLI tools; and the doc-mirror law + behavior rules.

entries.title: delivery-team
entries.description: Hook-free multi-agent feature-delivery pipeline. An orchestrator plus 10 specialist subagents (11 agents total) drive requirements -> design -> UI flow -> implementation -> review -> test -> build, with enforced quality gates, bounded remediation loops, and a durable, auditable per-feature log that survives session restarts. A read-only deliverables-packager (via /publish) renders the .md spine into client-ready Excel/Word/PDF, keeping .md the single source of truth. Stack-agnostic: each specialist learns the host project's stack and conventions from its CLAUDE.md and .claude/rules/.

entries.description: AI-assisted authoring and diagnosis for Ambience (Home Assistant) scene configuration. Bundles the ambience-author skill and the /ambience-create and /ambience-fix commands.

entries.title: agent-kevin
entries.description: Portable, file-based personal AI assistant. Compiles raw sessions into a queryable wiki, manages tasks across project lifecycles, drives SEO/web tools (GSC, PageSpeed, SerpAPI, headless browser, web search), and ships 20+ skills covering onboarding, daily/weekly/monthly cadences, audits, and content workflows. All data stays as local markdown + YAML.

entries.title: atl
entries.description: Mirror, edit, validate, and push Confluence pages and Jira issues with the atl CLI

entries.title: filipkrawiec-core
entries.description: Core agentic software engineering skills for domain modeling and architecture.

entries.title: context-mode
entries.description: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entries.title: sdk
entries.description: Agent skills and verified examples for writing Zapier SDK code that works.

entries.title: scribe
entries.description: per-project・Claude Code ネイティブの実装 administrator(ユーザー代理 AI)プラグイン。substrate(cc-session/beads/doobidoo)を compose し、spawn/監視/gate/role 別文脈注入を担う orchestration 層。v0 = 堀なし軽量モード(成文化 + 道具 + 3 role SessionStart 注入)。

entries.title: devflow
entries.description: Make agentic coding work on real codebases: DevFlow takes a one-line request to a complete, tested, reviewed, documented PR that's ready for your final review, and improves itself weekly. Includes /devflow:implement (4-phase orchestrator), /devflow:review and /devflow:review-and-fix (a verification-checklist review engine that audits its own approval), the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the self-improving retrospective loop (/devflow:retrospective per-PR + /devflow:retrospective-audit weekly).

entries.title: themekit
entries.description: ThemeKit SwiftUI design-system skill — tokenized components, runtime theming, theme presets, chainable modifiers.

entries.title: agenticloop
entries.description: Agentic Loop workflow toolkit: supervised orchestrator/maintainer/engineer roles plus markdown-first skills for planning, TDD, review, and closeout.

entries.title: flywheel
entries.description: Pragmatic Growth workflow skills for Claude Code and Droid (Factory CLI) — define-goal (plain-language wants → measurable goal contracts), dispatch (one-goal-per-run orchestrator on the current branch with TDD-backed checks and a local build+test gate), loop-architect (autonomous loop contracts), factory-doctor (one-pass preflight/doctor), and telegram-message (dispatch-gated Telegram DMs when a run errors, waits, or finishes).

entries.title: keel
entries.description: Foundation-first autonomous build workflow for Claude Code: spec the foundation, build feature-by-feature, gate every milestone with independent verification and a commit-pinned record. Stack-neutral — each project derives its own verification profile.

entries.title: dependabot-reviewer
entries.description: Review, verify, fix, and update Dependabot and ospo-renovate PRs across all GitHub hosts. /dependabot-review approves safe updates and sets automerge. /dependabot-verify reports PR status read-only. /dependabot-fix fixes PRs with merge conflicts or failing CI, with optional --yes flag for fully autonomous execution. /dependabot-update updates all open PR branches and resolves dependency-file merge conflicts autonomously.

entries.title: nvidia-kaggle
entries.description: Claude Code plugin for Kaggle competition workflows.

entries.title: skillbooks
entries.description: Every book read is a stat permanently raised. Your agent picks these up for good: mail a human would send, drafts that survive a cold reader, claims traced to their source, code swept for what a refactor left behind and for problems solved twice, and the judgment to know which decisions are truly yours.

entries.title: ritus
entries.description: AI-assisted development workflow - triage, task generation, execution, verification, and adversarial code review

entries.title: sofia-anthropic
entries.description: Sofia Fin System API skill for Claude Code — bank accounts, financial records, invoices, reconciliation, and analytics.

entries.title: aaron-marketing
entries.description: 120 marketing skills and 8 commands on one shared contract, arranged as a four-layer marketing operating system — Strategy (brand narrative), Channels (SEO/GEO, organic social, email, paid ads, influencer), Orchestration (product launch), and a shared Protocol layer of truth registries and memory. SEO/GEO (keyword research, content creation, technical audits, schema markup, programmatic/parasite/local SEO, site architecture, AI-traffic, monitoring), influencer marketing (audience insight, discovery, campaign planning, outreach, amplification, ROI tracking), paid ads across the ROAS loop, email marketing across the SEND loop, product launch across the RAMP loop, organic social across the ECHO loop (channel portfolio, voice dossiers, platform norm cards, calendars, platform-native creative, advocacy, social-quality audit, inbox/crisis ops, listening/SOV/dark-social measurement), and brand narrative & messaging across the TALE loop (message/positioning-truth tracing, durable message house, brand voice + naming canon, story bank, surface cascade, pitch narrative, enablement, proof packaging, the NQS gate, message testing, resonance and drift monitoring), plus a shared protocol layer (entity/creator/offer-claim/consent/launch/channel/narrative truth registries, project memory) serving all seven. Frameworks: CORE-EEAT, CITE, C3, ROAS, SEND, RAMP, ECHO, TALE.

entries.title: agent-harness
entries.description: Portable AI agent harness — curated review/build/test agents, secret-hardening + worktree + plan-gate hooks, and spec/supervise/wrap/verify-completion skills. Install once, use in every project. AI-agnostic core (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini).

entries.title: last30flames
entries.description: Research what is actually new about any topic in a recent time window. Full-content web results via Firecrawl, plus honest engagement signals from Hacker News and GitHub. No LLM key needed - the agent harness synthesizes the brief.

entries.title: cdp
entries.description: Structured Demolition Protocol for iteratively hardening any project specification through onboarding, critique, and integration cycles.

entries.title: sushidata-gtm
entries.description: Sushidata is a context data lake for long-term AI memory. This plugin turns Claude into a Sushidata-native agent: ingest community signals from Discord, Slack, and forums; run GTM prospecting and outbound with HeyReach and Apify; build competitor battlecards for PMMs; analyze campaign performance with research swarms; discover ICP signals from won/lost account data; and generate personalized outreach copy. Every finding is saved to the Sushidata context lake so future sessions have full memory of what was learned.

entries.title: clairvoyance
entries.description: A force multiplier for agent-to-human handoffs, turning work into evidence-backed decisions humans can trust.

entries.title: tempo
entries.description: Turn a natural-language date/time problem into correct, validated Tempo (Elixir) — ISO 8601 / IXDTF representation plus relations, set algebra, recurrence, scheduling, and constraint networks — and get a plain-language answer.

entries.title: hypo
entries.description: LLM-native personal wiki system — session-aware knowledge base for Claude Code

entries.title: hiloop
entries.description: Operate hiloop from your agent: authenticate, create and fork sandboxes, run commands, and query fork-tree telemetry via the hiloop CLI.

entries.title: devlog
entries.description: Automatic dev tracking for Claude Code via hooks and tags — a local dashboard for builds, plans, releases, security findings, and standards, with zero telemetry.

entries.title: research-plans
entries.description: Plan-based AI research workflows for social science: a lightweight master plan with a status tracker, versioned execution plans per component, an append-only decision log, a plan-quality rubric, and a browser board for review, annotation, and progress tracking.

entries.title: explainmyrepo
entries.description: Turn any GitHub repo into a beautiful, art-directed explainer site that takes a stranger from "I've never seen this" to "oh, I get why this matters — and I'm ready to use it." One Claude Code skill (the brain) reads the repo, builds a real RVF vector knowledge base, conceives a bespoke visual metaphor, authors the comprehension arc, generates raster + SVG visuals, assembles a responsive page on a shared design system, grades it on real pixels against a dual quality gate (>=95 on mobile and desktop), deploys it to its own URL, and ships a downloadable AI knowledge pack so the reader's AI gets it too. Pure, independently-testable tools do the mechanics; one BuildContext carries the work.

entries.title: keystone
entries.description: Keystone proactive multi-skill AI engineering workflows for planning, implementation, review, shipping, and maintenance.

entries.title: spec-to-pr
entries.description: Evidence-driven Claude Code plugin for turning briefs, Figma designs, and OpenAPI contracts into scored, verified pull requests.
